Not found in context.

The context states that Governor Duquesne sent additional French forces under Claude-Pierre Pecaudy de Contrecœur to relieve Saint-Pierre, but it does not specify the number of men in those forces. The 500 men mentioned refers to the force that Contrecœur led south from Fort Venango, not specifically the number sent to relieve Saint-Pierre.
expected: Contrecœur led 500 men south from Fort Venango on April 5, 1754
